title: puwq #6329
definition:
1) to bring out, furnish, promote, go out, issue
    1a) (Hiphil)
        1a1) to produce, furnish
        1a2) to bring out, elicit, obtain, cause to come out from
        1a3) to promote
        1a4) to cause to go out to
